steps.title: Add the known cells
steps.content:
The table accounts for males who play, females who play, and females who do not play:
$$
312+220+216=748
$$

steps.title: Subtract from the total
steps.content: There were $1{,}000$ total students, so the missing number of males who do not play a school sport is $$ 1{,}000-748=252 $$ The answer is B.
